src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) with JUnit 5 @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) to support the new test lifecycle.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner annotations are ignored or cause conflicts in JUnit 5 environments; tests will fail to initialize the Spring context without the JUnit 5 extension.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Before annotation with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach to ensure setup methods are executed.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize JUnit 4 @Before annotations, causing setup logic to be skipped and tests to fail due to uninitialized mocks.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 and Spring Test JUnit 5 extension classes instead of JUnit 4 equivalents.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The old JUnit 4 and Spring Test JUnit 4 classes are either removed or incompatible with the JUnit 5 engine, leading to compilation errors or runtime failures.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by updating the import for the @Test annotation.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The class uses org.junit.Test which is part of JUnit 4; if the project dependencies are updated to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and JUnit 4 is removed or excluded, this import will cause a compilation error.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate test assertions from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by updating the static import for assertEquals.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The class uses org.junit.Assert.assertEquals which is part of JUnit 4; if the project dependencies are updated to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and JUnit 4 is removed or excluded, this import will cause a compilation error.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by updating the import for the @Test annotation.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The class fails to compile on the target JDK because the JUnit 4 dependency (org.junit:junit) is removed or incompatible, and the code references the non-existent org.junit.Test class.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate test assertions from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by updating the import for assertEquals.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The class fails to compile on the target JDK because the JUnit 4 dependency is removed, and the code references the non-existent org.junit.Assert.assertEquals method.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate test annotation from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with the updated JUnit Jupiter dependency.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The import org.junit.Test refers to JUnit 4, which is no longer the primary testing framework; using JUnit 5 annotations is required for compatibility with the updated test runner and dependencies.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: Compile error: class 'org.junit.Test' not found in JUnit 5 environment.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertion import to JUnit 5.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: Compile error: class 'org.junit.Assert' not found in JUnit 5 environment.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate test annotation from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with the updated JUnit Jupiter dependency.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The import org.junit.Test refers to JUnit 4, which is no longer the primary testing framework; using JUnit 5 annotations is required for compatibility with the updated test runner and dependencies.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate test annotation from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with the updated dependency version.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The import org.junit.Test refers to JUnit 4, which is no longer the primary testing framework; JUnit 5 (Jupiter) is required for compatibility with the updated junit-jupiter dependency and Spring Boot 3.x.

src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5 Jupiter API.
src/test/java/de/viadee/bpm/camunda/exte.why_exists: The JUnit 4 'org.junit.Test' class is not part of the JUnit 5 Jupiter engine; using it with JUnit 5 dependencies results in a compile error or the test being ignored/not executed by the Jupiter engine.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project version string to reflect the new development cycle.
Upgrade the target Java version from 17 to 21 and align compiler source/target properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping Java 17 settings would result in code compiled for an older JDK, missing out on JDK 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with dependencies requiring JDK 21.
